name: How do I prove my occupational illness happened at work when there are no witnesses in Saint George?
description: Medical + records prove it; witnesses not required[3].

mainEntity.name: How do I prove my occupational illness happened at work when there are no witnesses in Saint George?

acceptedAnswer.text: Medical + records prove it; witnesses not required[3].
acceptedAnswer.description:
Use medical opinions, records, safety data.

Circumstantial evidence suffices; no witnesses not fatal[3].

- Exposure logs, MSDS sheets.
- Coworker affidavits later.
- Expert causation testimony.

Build file methodically; legal aid compels discovery.
